bank.dataset_description: UCI Bank Marketing dataset. Predicts whether client subscribes to term deposit (binary: yes/no). Contains 10 categorical columns (job, marital, education, default, housing, loan, contact, month, day_of_week, poutcome). education has natural ordering (basic.4y < basic.6y < basic.9y < high.school < professional.course < university.degree). month and day_of_week are cyclical/nominal. High-cardinality: job (12), month (10), education (8). No true ID columns.
must_not_do: Do NOT use ordinal encoding on nominal categories for linear/distance models
bank.notes: Dataset domain: banking/marketing. Categorical nature: mostly nominal except education (ordinal). One-hot encoding recommended for nominal categories. Scaling is critical. education could use ordinal encoding.
